global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with a prominent logo and gameplay elements.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to join and play with friends in NeonArena.

elements.label: Blue gradient background
elements.description: A smooth blue gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: NeonArena logo
elements.description: A stylized logo with the text 'NeonArena' prominently displayed at the top.

elements.label: Gameplay screenshot
elements.description: A screenshot showing a grid layout with circular icons, representing gameplay elements.

elements.label: Join the arena text

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A button with the text 'Start now' at the bottom of the ad, inviting user interaction.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by gameplay icons and body text in the center, with a CTA button at the bottom.
